text: Researchers at MIT have developed a new machine learning algorithm that dramatically improves protein folding predictions, potentially accelerating drug discovery by identifying genetic mutation effects at scale.

The composer's latest symphony draws heavily from Baroque counterpoint techniques, weaving melodic lines inspired by Bach across a full orchestral palette to create a work that feels both ancient and distinctly contemporary.

A recently discovered vulnerability in widely-used cryptographic libraries could allow attackers to decrypt data protected by older TLS implementations. Security teams are urged to patch affected systems immediately.
Field studies in the Amazon basin reveal that deforestation is disrupting food webs at every trophic level, with cascading effects on pollinator populations that may take decades to fully manifest.

The decentralized finance platform was hacked for $120 million after an attacker exploited a reentrancy bug in its smart contract code, reigniting debates about the maturity of blockchain-based financial systems.
